scoringPlays.text: Caleb Wooden 16 Yd Return of Blocked Punt (Scott Starzyk Kick)

videos.headline: Arkansas Razorbacks vs. LSU Tigers: Full Highlights
videos.description: Arkansas Razorbacks vs. LSU Tigers: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arkansas Razorbacks vs. LSU Tigers: Full Highlights) 2025/11/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: LSU edges Hogs to win Golden Boot in Frank Wilson's first win
videos.description: Michael Van Buren Jr. hits Bauer Sharp for the game-winning touchdown as the Tigers edge Arkansas, 23-22, to reclaim the Golden Boot and give Wilson his first win as LSU's interim head coach.
